text: Wire extractReflection to actually query the watchdog and parse a real reflection (replace the scrollback stub)
description: SessionMemory.extractReflection builds a reflectionPrompt but never sends it — patterns/lessonsLearned are always empty and aimsWorked/outcomes are regex-scraped from terminal scrollback (low signal; visible as garbled "Previous Session Insights"). Wire it to send the prompt to the watchdog via the existing request/response path, await the JSON, and populate patterns/lessonsLearned plus a new systemLimitations field. Needs async plumbing in watchdog-service; design the await/timeout carefully so a slow/failed reflection never blocks compaction.

reflections.context: Wire a real session reflection (patterns/lessons/systemLimitations) without a fragile extra watchdog round-trip racing the single-in-flight tick() loop.
reflections.outcome: Approach B: folded optional reflection fields into the existing compact action JSON; executeCompact now persists a SessionSummary with them. Found en route that the state-machine path never reflected at all — extractReflection lived only in the legacy executeAction (test-only). So this both activated reflection in the live loop and gave it real content.
reflections.effectiveness: High value-to-risk once scoped as backward-compatible: omitted fields fall back to '' so the live compaction path is unaffected even if the model never emits them. Fully unit-tested; no live PTY verification needed because the fallback preserves prior behavior.
reflections.lesson: Before 'wiring' a feature, confirm the live path even invokes the code you think you're extending — the reflection was dead in the active path, which changed the whole shape of the fix. Backward-compatible optional fields turn an 'unverifiable overnight' change into a safe one.

status.comment: Implemented approach B in commit 38c67c4. compact action carries optional patterns/lessonsLearned/systemLimitations; executeCompact (the live path, which previously never reflected) saves a SessionSummary folding them in, before compacting. Backward compatible + best-effort. Also discovered & fixed that reflection was dead in the state-machine path (only the legacy executeAction had it). 3 new tests; 11/11 + 24/24 green.
